headline: Eleven Labs Inc. announced that it has received $499.99936 million in funding from a group of investors
summary: On May 5, 2026, Eleven Labs Inc. closed the transaction. The company has raised additional funds in its third tranche. The tranche involved participation from new investors BlackRock, Inc., Wellington...

headline: ElevenLabs CEO Mati Staniszewski on surpassing $500M in ARR, future of voice and AI
summary: Mati Staniszewski, ElevenLabs CEO, joins 'Squawk Box' to discuss the company surpassing $500M in annual recurring revenue, future of voice and AI, rise of AI customer agents, fight over AI voice rights, and more.

headline: Markets on edge as fresh U.S.-Iran attacks dent optimism over a peace deal
summary: The U.S.' bid to re-open the Strait of Hormuz, dubbed "Project Freedom," was nicknamed "Project Deadlock" by Iran.

headline: BlackRock: GCC faces structural reset, not short-term shock from Iran war
summary: Ben Powell from BlackRock says the GCC is undergoing a structural shift as globalization weakens and the region's economies move toward self-reliance in the wake of the U.S.-Iran war. He expects GCC countries could turn more inward, and pull back $50 billion - $100 billion worth of funds from global projects to focus more on their own economies.
